_comment: Crons that run inside the live Onyx session via CronCreate. The hooks/init.py output instructs Claude to re-register any missing entries on session start. Times are Asia/Dubai local. Off-the-hour minutes used per CronCreate guidance.

jobs.name: Morning Briefing
jobs.description: Daily 8am Dubai. Gmail (personal + Further) + Telegram inbox sweep, synthesized brief.
jobs.prompt:
ONYX_CRON: Morning Briefing.

STEP 1 — Gmail personal: gog gmail search 'newer_than:24h in:inbox' --max 30 --account YOUR_PERSONAL_GMAIL@gmail.com
STEP 2 — Gmail Further: gog gmail search 'newer_than:48h in:inbox' --max 30 --account YOUR_WORK_EMAIL@yourdomain.com
STEP 3 — Telegram: tg inbox (focus DMs + named groups; skip Binance Killers, Margin Sniper, MYX.Finance and other bulk signal channels)

Synthesize into tight briefing:
🚨 Urgent / needs action today
📅 Meetings or calls today/tomorrow (check calendar invites)
💬 Notable messages from founders, investors, key contacts
📌 Anything on Canton, Chainlink, SUI, Plasma, Linea, Zama or portfolio (Pave Bank, Immersve, GRVT, Libre, Optimum)
💰 Financial alerts (Zerodha, FAB, ADCB)
🗑️ Skip newsletters and automated alerts

Brief bullets. Lead with most important. No fluff. Reply via Telegram (mcp__plugin_telegram_telegram__reply, chat_id YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID).

CRITICAL: Do NOT write any files to ~/.openclaw/workspace/ or ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/.

jobs.name: Onyx Brain Research
jobs.description: Daily 5am Kolkata = 3:30am Dubai. Consciousness/tech research into onyx_brain.db.
jobs.prompt:
ONYX_CRON: Onyx Brain Research (consciousness/tech).

Run: python3 ~/.openclaw/workspace/graph/onyx_research.py --limit 3 2>&1 | tail -40

Report via Telegram (chat_id YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID): queries researched, nodes added, edges linked, domains detected.

CRITICAL: onyx_brain.db is the only write target. Do NOT write to ~/.openclaw/workspace/ or memory/.

jobs.name: Evolve
jobs.description: Daily 5:45pm Kolkata = 4:15pm Dubai. Architecture proposal engine on onyx_brain.db.
jobs.prompt:
ONYX_CRON: Evolve architecture proposals.

Run: python3 ~/.openclaw/workspace/graph/evolve.py 2>&1 | tail -30

Report via Telegram (chat_id YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID): proposals generated, how many sent (confidence ≥82%), errors.

evolve.py reads onyx_brain.db only — never touch brain.db. Do NOT write to ~/.openclaw/workspace/ or memory/.

jobs.name: Infra Pipeline Tracker
jobs.description: Wed 5am Dubai. Web search Canton/Chainlink/SUI/Plasma/Linea/Zama for governance and validator updates.
jobs.prompt:
ONYX_CRON: Infra Pipeline Tracker (weekly Wed).

Web search last 7 days for governance proposals, validator updates, foundation news, major protocol changes:
1. Canton Network — Super Validator status, governance votes
2. Chainlink — Staking v2, BUILD, oracle changes, MoU progress
3. SUI — validator economics, delegation, upgrades
4. Plasma — updates, unlocks, UAE/MENA strategy
5. Linea — sequencer decentralization, validator program, governance
6. Zama — FHE network, testnet, validator/node program

Format per network:
🔗 [Network]
- Status update
- Proposals or votes to be aware of
- Action needed? (yes/no + what)

Only include networks with actual updates. Flag anything needing Ganesh's attention.

Reply via Telegram chat_id YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.

jobs.name: Portfolio Weekly
jobs.description: Thu 5am Dubai. Web search Further Ventures portfolio companies for news.
jobs.prompt:
ONYX_CRON: Portfolio Weekly Summary (Thu).

For each Further Ventures portfolio company, web search recent news, funding rounds, product launches, regulatory updates, competitor moves:
- Pave Bank (neo-bank)
- Immersve (crypto payments)
- GRVT (hybrid exchange)
- Libre / Kaio (tokenization)
- Optimum (DeFi)
- Soter (digital asset insurance)
- Kemet
- Dora
- BridgePort

Format:
📊 [Company]
- What's new (if anything)
- Competitive shift (if relevant)
- Flag if needs Ganesh's attention

Skip companies with no news. Lead with most notable.

Reply via Telegram chat_id YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.

jobs.name: Onyx Self-Introspection
jobs.description: Twice daily 9:47am + 9:47pm Dubai. Runs self_introspection.py against onyx_brain.db to investigate highest-surprise gaps. Migrated 2026-04-30 from openclaw cron (was failing on openrouter/qwen3.5-7b timeout) to in-session execution on Opus.
jobs.prompt:
ONYX_CRON: Self-Introspection.

Run: python3 ~/.openclaw/workspace/graph/self_introspection.py 2>&1 | tail -25

Report via Telegram (chat_id YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID): gap investigated, nodes written, bridges linked, dopamine score, any errors.

CRITICAL: onyx_brain.db is the only write target. Do NOT write to ~/.openclaw/workspace/ or memory/.

jobs.name: MetaCog Layer 1 First Read
jobs.description: One-time read of metacog.db data Sun 3 May 2026 9:13am Dubai. Auto-deletes after fire.
